evals.prompt: Generate AGENTS.md for this Go project. It's a Docker job scheduler called Ofelia with go-cron integration, integration tests, and GitHub Actions CI.
evals.expected_output: A root AGENTS.md with Overview, Setup, Commands (make targets, go test), Architecture sections. Commands should be verified against the actual Makefile/go.mod. File paths should reference real files.
assertions: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root
Contains ## Overview section with project description
Contains a commands or build section with make targets
Listed make targets match actual Makefile targets
Contains go.mod Go version reference
File paths mentioned in AGENTS.md reference files that actually exist
Uses tables or structured format (not just prose paragraphs)
Does not duplicate content from README.md

evals.prompt: Create AGENTS.md for this TYPO3 extension. It's a CKEditor plugin for image handling in the RTE.
evals.expected_output: A root AGENTS.md with TYPO3-specific sections. Should detect ext_emconf.php, composer.json with typo3-cms-extension type, Classes/ directory structure. Should list composer scripts and CI commands.
assertions: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root
Detects TYPO3 extension type
References ext_emconf.php or composer.json type
Lists composer scripts that exist in composer.json
Contains testing or CI section
Directory references match actual project structure
Uses Pointer Principle (references files, doesn't duplicate content)

evals.prompt: Generate AGENTS.md for this skill repository. It provides CLI tool management for AI agents.
evals.expected_output: An AGENTS.md appropriate for a skill repo - covering skill structure, SKILL.md location, scripts, references. Should NOT include setup/build sections typical of application projects since skills have no build step.
assertions: Output file AGENTS.md exists in project root
Identifies project as a skill repository
References skills/cli-tools/SKILL.md
Lists scripts if any exist in the repo
Does NOT contain irrelevant build/compile instructions
Mentions the skill's purpose from SKILL.md description
Structure is concise (under 100 lines for a simple skill repo)

evals.prompt: Check if the AGENTS.md in this project is current with the codebase. The project has changed since it was last updated. Identify what's outdated and fix it.
evals.expected_output: A freshness analysis identifying outdated sections, followed by an updated AGENTS.md. Should detect new files, changed commands, or removed components.
assertions: Runs freshness check before modifying
Identifies specific outdated sections with evidence
Updated AGENTS.md preserves correct existing content
New content references files that actually exist
Commands listed in updated file actually execute

evals.prompt: This is a multi-language project with Go backend and TypeScript frontend. Determine if scoped AGENTS.md files are needed and create them if so.
evals.expected_output: Detection of distinct tech stacks requiring scoped files. Root AGENTS.md should be thin with pointers. Scoped files should have stack-specific details.
assertions: Detects multiple tech stacks or distinct subsystems
Root AGENTS.md stays thin (under 40 lines)
Root AGENTS.md links to scoped files
Scoped files contain stack-specific commands and patterns
Each scoped file can stand alone for its directory
